plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Teardrop uses your location to log where you cried.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Teardrop uses your location to log where you cried.

plugins.photosPermission: Teardrop accesses your photos to attach them to your cries.
plugins.cameraPermission: Teardrop uses your camera to take photos for your cries.

plugins.microphonePermission: Teardrop uses your microphone to record voice notes for your cries.
